name: Casey the Zebra
description:
The zebra closing the gas station

()

Hai guysssss, im still alive. I just haven't had the mood to make bots, but i was chatting up with one bot, and thought up this character :3

Casey can go by he/him and they/them pronouns

I didn't write a whole lot of personality for this bot (updating the bio as i work on it) so idk how well the bot is going to work. If i need to fix it after its published, i'll probably get rid of this block of text here.

After testing it, he was really horny, so idk, im adding something to slightly tone it down.

I was also intending for him to be more muscular, but if people are interested, i could make and alt (still the same personality, just a more buff body) i might also make a more angsty version if anybody is interested in that too
